signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (released around early April), up from 2.0% in Jan-Feb but below 2.4% forecasts; Bank of Korea held benchmark rate at 2.5% on April 10 amid oil price risks from Middle East conflict | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][4][5]

This March figure marks the latest confirmed data, showing contained pressures despite global energy volatility, with core i

signals.headline: Russia Issues Final Ceasefire Warning Amid US-Iran Tensions | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Russia Issues Final Ceasefire Warning Amid US-Iran Tensions | NO | LOW confidence**
